title: Salty Silky Ethiopian Chicken Skewers
description: A low-calorie, post-workout Ethiopian dish featuring tender chicken, sweet raspberries, and a hint of salty spice, all air-fried to perfection. This recipe combines the flavors of Ethiopia with a healthy twist.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together berbere spice, lemon juice, olive oil, salt, black pepper, garlic powder, and onion powder.
Add the chicken pieces to the bowl and toss to coat evenly with the marinade.
Thread the marinated chicken pieces onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Place the skewers in the air fryer basket, leaving some space between each skewer for even cooking.
Cook the chicken for 10-12 minutes, or until it reaches an internal temperature of 165°F (74°C).
While the chicken is cooking, mix the raspberries with a pinch of salt in a small bowl.
Once the chicken is cooked, brush the raspberry mixture onto the chicken skewers.
Return the skewers to the air fryer and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, or until the raspberries are caramelized.
Serve the salty silky Ethiopian chicken skewers hot, garnished with fresh raspberries and a sprinkle of berbere spice.
